Rules.InvariantScript:
Switch(
    locShowPopUp,
    "Not Connected",
    "Data cannot be saved because the device is not connected to the internet.  Please try again when your device has an internet connection.",
    "Save Error",
    CountRows(colAUDRecords)&" records were not saved due to an error.  Press back to attempt another save.  Any unsaved data will be lost if you press ignore."
)
"It looks like you're on a cellular connection. Click 'Continue' to save Photos now, or 'Skip' to proceed without uploading photos."

Filter(
    colAUDRecords,
    Type in cmb_Saving_Type.SelectedItems.Result,
    Operation in cmb_Saving_Operation.SelectedItems.Result
)

With(
    {varCount: CountRows(Self.AllItems)},
    Self.Width / If(
        varCount = 0,
        1,
        varCount
    ) - Self.TemplatePadding
)

With(
    {varCount: CountRows(Self.AllItems)},
    If(
        varCount = 0,
        0,
        varCount <= 25,
        5,
        varCount <= 50,
        3,
        2
    )
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString: If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(320, Self.Width - 60), Min(320, Self.Height - 60))
